environment.docker_or_native_note: Run configs record external MCP clients over HTTP, but do not state whether the arena server was Docker or native for these rounds.

model_labels.note: Exact benchmark model identities are inferred from folder names/normalized CSV. Per-model build IDs and reasoning settings were not recorded in run artifacts.

prompt_template.redaction_note: controller_token values are redacted before hashing; exact token-bearing prompt text is not duplicated in metadata.

recorded_run_parameters.config_total_rounds_note: config.json total_rounds varies because some POV batches were run/resumed in chunks; validated folder coverage is 10 rounds per POV and 120 total rounds.
recorded_run_parameters.seed_policy: single recorded seed reused for all rounds
recorded_run_parameters.starting_health_note: Starting health is not explicitly recorded in config.json or summary.json for these run artifacts.

scope: Frozen reproducibility metadata for the already-analyzed 120-round benchmark; benchmark defaults and results were not regenerated.
